narrative:
Precinct Madison Twp A (precinct in Lake County) has 831 registered voters, with 62.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.5%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.4 percentage points.
